caption: A static black screen displays white text organized into two columns. The left column reads "Ohio University Libraries DIGITAL INITIATIVES" followed by the URL "http://media.library.ohiou.edu". Below this, it states "Slideshow created by: David Creighton (Student Collections Access Assistant)" and "Video edited by P. Matthew Wesley (Student Collections Access Assistant)". The right column begins with "Music: Break Time" and "by Kevin MacLeod (Copyright 2007)". This is followed by "Accessed via: http://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free" and the licensing information: "Licensed under Creativecommons By Attribution 3.0 http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/". There are no people, objects, or changes in the scene across the frames, as the image remains a consistent credit screen.
